items.title: Prime Day 2026 deal hub – LAST DAY: Get in there before the best price drops are gone for good
items.summary: Here we go folks – the final 24 hours f the massive Amazon Prime Day sale has arrived and the clock is ticking. Prices are starting to jump back up on select gear but there are still some seriously great deals live and some all-new offers in Amazon’s Started Today, Doorbusters, and Today’s Big Deal sections. We are still tracking Prime Day pricing on AirPods Pro 3 and all-time lows on Apple Watch Series 11, as well as a host of Anker charging gear, loads of e-bikes, and power stations, the Google Pixel 10 lineup, and much more. Check it all out down below before it’s gone for good.

items.title: Pixel 10 and 10 Pro XL Prime Day deals have now dropped even lower starting from $519 (Up to $315 off)
items.summary: It’s time for day 2 of the massive Amazon Prime Day event and much like we saw late yesterday on the more affordable standard model and 10 Pro/XL at up to $315 off.

items.title: EcoFlow expands Prime Day Sale with up to 63% power station discounts, bonus savings, FREE gifts, 3x credits, more – all from $142
items.summary:
Update 6/26: EcoFlow has dropped the FREE power bank bundle on the DELTA Pro and included it in its flash sale for $1,399 shipped going forward. The lineup of deals below the fold has been adjusted.

Running parallel to Amazon’s Prime Day event, EcoFlow has officially launched its full Prime Day Sale lineup with up to 63% power station discounts, bonus extra savings, FREE gifts, and 3x EcoCredit rewards. You can find major deals beating out most of the 2026 sale prices we’ve seen, like the 3,600Wh DELTA Pro Portable Power Station that gets a FREE 170W 25K power bank at $1,519.05 shipped, after using the sitewide code 26EFPDAFF at checkout, beating out the station-only Amazon offer by $65. Down from $3,699 directly, since mid-January we haven’t seen much change in price on this model, with it having jumped up to $1,599 until March when it began bouncing between $1,899 and $1,699, with occasional spikes as high as $2,599. Now, not only are you getting much more savings ($1,080 off the going rate, $2,180 off the MSRP) to the second-best price of 2026, but you also get a free RAPID 170W 25K power bank at no extra cost ($80 value). Head below to get the rundown on all the Prime Day promotions and to browse the full lineup of deals.

items.title: EcoFlow switches up Prime flash sale to drop the 3,600Wh DELTA Pro power station to a $1,399 2026 low, more from $750
items.summary: As part of EcoFlow’s Prime Day Sale, which coincides with the Amazon Prime Day savings event, the brand has switched up some of its flash sale offers, with the biggest change being the 3,600Wh DELTA Pro Portable Power Station now down at $1,399 shipped, beating out Amazon by $80. Don’t be fooled by the initial $1,499 pricing, as an additional $100 will be automatically cut from the tag in your cart. It’s down from $3,699 directly, though it only ever climbed as high as $2,599 in this year, which we previously saw in this sale listed for $1,599 ($1,519 with the code). With this changeup, you’re able to get an even larger $1,200 markdown off the going rate ($2,300 off the MSRP), landing it at the best price of 2026 that last appeared in January and the second-lowest price overall – just above the low from Black Friday. You can head below to check out all the flash sale offers, or browse the full lineup of deals in our original coverage here.

items.title: LAST CHANCE to grab this Anker 45W Nano charger with Smart Display at $26 Prime Day low
items.summary:
Anker Nano 45W charger with smart display

Buy for $26 (Reg. $40)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

The blue version of the Anker Nano 45W charger is the only one still holding at $25.99 Prime all-time low, with every other color back up to their full prices. It’s a compact 45W USB-C charger with a small display to show charging info, a fold-flat plug for travel, and enough power to handle an iPhone, iPad, or even a MacBook Air.

items.title: Selling out quick: M5 Pro/Max MacBook Pro up to $850 under the new list prices for Prime Day
items.summary: The final day of the 2026 Amazon Prime Day sale has arrived and now that Apple has announced sweeping price hikes across its current-generation MacBook lineup (as well as iPads and more), you’ll want to get in on the deals fast. MacBook Pro models are selling out quick and with some of them now $500 more pricey at Apple, these Amazon deals will likely be the best prices we see in a long while, and by a long shot – the M5 Pro is as much as $600 off while some models are as much as $850 under the new list prices right now.

items.title: Meta Quest 3S headsets drop to their lowest since price hike for Prime Day, starting at $297
items.summary: As part of the ongoing Prime Day sale, Amazon is now offering Meta’s 128GB Quest 3S headset to $297 shipped. This model originally launched at $300 before climbing to $350 earlier this year, and today’s deal takes $53 off that going rate to mark the lowest price we have tracked since the price jump. The 256GB model is also on sale for $382 shipped, down from the $450 price it has been fetching lately. Walmart is matching both offers as part of its competing sale event running alongside Prime Day. Head below for more details.

items.title: Skip sketchy public Wi-Fi with TP-Link’s portable Wi-Fi 7 router, now just $90 for Prime Day
items.summary: As part of the ongoing Prime Day sale, Amazon is offering TP-Link’s Roam BE3600 Wi-Fi 7 portable router down at $89.99 shipped. Originally $140, this compact portable router powered by USB-C has more recently been going for $120. While it has dropped to the $99 mark a few times this year, today’s Prime Day offer takes an additional $9 off that to deliver a new best price to beat. This is definitely a must-have if you travel a lot and are constantly worried about connecting to a public network.

items.title: You don’t have long to score these Prime Day deals on Logitech’s MX Master 3S from  just $56 (Reg. $100)
items.summary: We’re on the final stretch of the 2026 Prime Day sale event, and there are still plenty of notable deals worth checking out. While Logitech’s latest MX Master 4 has not seen a Prime Day discount yet, the MX Master 3S can now be had for as low as $56. That’s right, Woot’s ongoing Logitech sale event has a refurbished MX Master 3S in black down at $56.29 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise), with promo code DEALDAY26. That’s 44% off its $100 usual going rate and the best price we have tracked for it. If you’d rather buy a new one, Amazon has one listed for $75.99 shipped as part of its Prime Day sale. Either way, you’re getting a solid deal here to snag one for your workstation without shelling out the full $100 price.

items.title: LAST DAY to score Anker’s 2026 Prime Day deals: Up to 50% off Nano chargers, Qi2.2 stands, power banks, and more from just $10
items.summary:
Update 06/26: The final 24 hours of the 2026 Amazon Prime Day sale has officially kicked off, meaning it’s the last day to score Anker’s Prime Day deals and lock in the best prices of the year.

We are officially on Day 3 of Amazon’s Prime Day sale and are continuing to see fresh offers on many of our favorite gear. On top of the offers that went live earlier this week, Anker’s official Amazon storefront has now added several new deals to the mix, including an even deeper deal on its 14-in-1 Thunderbolt 5 dock. A handful of multi-device charging stations are also seeing additional price drops, and you’re looking at up to 50% in savings right now with these Prime Day deals. All the new ones, along with the existing Prime Day deals, are all ready and waiting for you below, so be sure to check them out if you haven’t already.

items.title: Score the still affordable MacBook Neo at $110 off during Prime Day before the price hike hits Amazon
items.summary: Apple’s sweeping price increases have now gone live on its official site, and will almost certainly their way to Amazon sooner than later to make that particularly affordable MacBook Neo not so affordable anymore. Now $100 more expensive at Apple, Amazon’s is still offering it at $10 under the old MSRP so you can effectively pick one up at $110 off right now – this might be the best deal we see in a long time and one that could be gone as early as tomorrow morning or sooner.

items.title: Land Prime Day pricing on AirPods Pro 3 while you still can, one of the best deals ever still live at $70 off
items.summary: The Day 3 Amazon Prime Day sale is now underway with hundreds of new discounts, but as some of the hottest deals we have tracked already have begun to disappear, we wanted to highlight this year’s AirPods Pro 3 offer. We have already started to see pricing on select current-generation Apple gear jump back up in price, but you can still land its latest AirPods Pro down at $70 off.

items.title: Final 24 hours of Amazon’s massive 2026 Prime Day starts now: Apple, Anker, LEGO, Android gear, more
items.summary: This it folks, the final 24 hours of the 2026 Amazon Prime Day sale has begun. You have until 1-day left to take advantage of the ongoing deals while they are still live (some of them are going quick) and you will now find all-new deals waiting in the Today’s Big Deals and Started Today deal section over on the main Prime Day landing page.

items.title: Logitech Prime Day Woot sale now live at up to 77% off: Deals on Mac and gaming accessories from just $10
items.summary: Woot’s Logitech sale is back for Prime Day, and we’re looking at a ton of new deals this time around with discounts reaching up to a whopping 70%. You can also use promo code DEALDAY26 and unlock additional savings of up to 20% (up to 25% as a new customer) to get deeper discounts over the prices highlighted for many of the brand’s popular peripherals on sale. Most of the gear on sale at Woot right now is in new condition, but you’ll also find open-box and refurbished units at even lower prices, like the MX Master 3S wireless mouse at just $56.24 Prime shipped with the prom code. Head below for more details.

items.title: Amazon might have just leaked a bunch of Grand Theft Auto 6 gameplay details
items.summary:
Grand Theft Auto VI pre-orders are in full swing at Amazon, Walmart, GameStop, and elsewhere, about gazillion people have already secured a copy, and Rockstar still hasn’t even showed us any real gameplay. It hasn’t even really detailed much more than the game world at this point, but Amazon is not only in the midst of its giant Prime Day sale right now, but it also might have just leaked some new tidbits regarding real-time protagonist switching, in-game social network action that ties into secret side missions, and more. 

  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at Amazon on PS5 and Xbox.
  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at Walmart on PS5 and Xbox.
  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at GameStop on PS5 or Xbox.

items.title: IBM Claims To Have Created World’s First Sub 1nm Chip
items.summary:
IBM has come out of the shadows with the claim that it has created the world’s first sub 1nm chip. To be precise, the new transistor measures in at 7 Angstrom (7A) or 0.7nm. For context, the smallest chip architecture prior to IBM’s breakthrough was Intel’s 18A, which is currently being used in its Panther […]

The post IBM Claims To Have Created World’s First Sub 1nm Chip appeared first on Lowyat.NET.
